app.name: suppress-ts-errors
app.one_liner: CLI tool to automatically insert @ts-expect-error or @ts-ignore comments to suppress TypeScript type errors in .ts, .tsx, and Vue SFC <script> blocks.

screens.name: CLI Execution Interface
screens.purpose: Allows users to run the suppression command with configurable options such as comment type, tsconfig path, error code inclusion, and glob patterns.

rust_commands.name: suppress_errors
rust_commands.purpose: Analyzes TypeScript diagnostics and injects suppression comments into source files based on user configuration.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add support for @ts-expect-error and @ts-ignore insertion
week 1: Implement core diagnostic parsing from tsc
acceptance_tests: Tool includes TS error codes in comments when --error-code is enabled.
Tool processes .vue files and suppresses errors only in <script> sections, ignoring <template>.
Tool respects --comment-type flag to switch between @ts-expect-error and @ts-ignore.
Tool successfully inserts @ts-expect-error comments in .ts files when run with default settings.
